{
  EmployeeColumnAttributes.g.cs:
// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable
namespace Excelsior;
using System.Runtime.CompilerServices;
file static class EmployeeColumnAttributesRegistration
{
    [ModuleInitializer]
    internal static void Register()
    {
        GeneratedColumnAttributes.Register(typeof(global::Employee), "Id", new(Heading: "Employee ID", Order: 1));
        GeneratedColumnAttributes.Register(typeof(global::Employee), "Name", new(Width: 20));
    }
},
  EmployeeSheetBuilderExtensions.g.cs:
// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable
namespace Excelsior;
using System;
public static class EmployeeSheetBuilderExtensions
{
    public static ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> IdColumn(
        this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder,
        Action<ColumnConfig<global::Employee, int>> configuration)
        => builder.Column(_ => _.Id, configuration);

    public static void IdHeadingText(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, string value)
        => builder.HeadingText(_ => _.Id, value);

    public static void IdOrder(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, int? value)
        => builder.Order(_ => _.Id, value);

    public static void IdWidth(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, int? value)
        => builder.Width(_ => _.Id, value);

    public static void IdMinWidth(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, int? value)
        => builder.MinWidth(_ => _.Id, value);

    public static void IdMaxWidth(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, int? value)
        => builder.MaxWidth(_ => _.Id, value);

    public static void IdHeadingStyle(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, Action<Excelsior.CellStyle> value)
        => builder.HeadingStyle(_ => _.Id, value);

    public static void IdCellStyle(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, Action<Excelsior.CellStyle, global::Employee, int> value)
        => builder.CellStyle(_ => _.Id, value);

    public static void IdFormat(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, string value)
        => builder.Format(_ => _.Id, value);

    public static void IdNullDisplay(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, string value)
        => builder.NullDisplay(_ => _.Id, value);

    public static void IdIsHtml(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder)
        => builder.IsHtml(_ => _.Id);

    public static void IdRender(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, Func<global::Employee, int, string?> value)
        => builder.Render(_ => _.Id, value);

    public static void IdFilter(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder)
        => builder.Filter(_ => _.Id);

    public static void IdInclude(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, bool value)
        => builder.Include(_ => _.Id, value);

    public static void IdExclude(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder)
        => builder.Exclude(_ => _.Id);

    public static ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> NameColumn(
        this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder,
        Action<ColumnConfig<global::Employee, string>> configuration)
        => builder.Column(_ => _.Name, configuration);

    public static void NameHeadingText(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, string value)
        => builder.HeadingText(_ => _.Name, value);

    public static void NameOrder(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, int? value)
        => builder.Order(_ => _.Name, value);

    public static void NameWidth(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, int? value)
        => builder.Width(_ => _.Name, value);

    public static void NameMinWidth(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, int? value)
        => builder.MinWidth(_ => _.Name, value);

    public static void NameMaxWidth(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, int? value)
        => builder.MaxWidth(_ => _.Name, value);

    public static void NameHeadingStyle(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, Action<Excelsior.CellStyle> value)
        => builder.HeadingStyle(_ => _.Name, value);

    public static void NameCellStyle(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, Action<Excelsior.CellStyle, global::Employee, string> value)
        => builder.CellStyle(_ => _.Name, value);

    public static void NameFormat(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, string value)
        => builder.Format(_ => _.Name, value);

    public static void NameNullDisplay(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, string value)
        => builder.NullDisplay(_ => _.Name, value);

    public static void NameIsHtml(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder)
        => builder.IsHtml(_ => _.Name);

    public static void NameRender(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, Func<global::Employee, string, string?> value)
        => builder.Render(_ => _.Name, value);

    public static void NameFilter(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder)
        => builder.Filter(_ => _.Name);

    public static void NameInclude(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, bool value)
        => builder.Include(_ => _.Name, value);

    public static void NameExclude(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder)
        => builder.Exclude(_ => _.Name);
}
